title: Michael Heisler

|birth=[[October 22]], [[1960s#1962|1962]], [[Wikipedia:Pittsburgh|Pittsburgh]], [[Wikipedia:Pennsylvania|Pennsylvania]]<ref name="Todd's Blog">{{WebCite|url=https://kleinletters.com/Blog/more-1980s-letterers-part-2/|text=More 1980s Letterers Part 2|work=Todd's Blog|author=Todd Klein|date=2023-12-20|archivedate=20251122100233}}</ref>

'''Michael Heisler''' is a letterer for [[Dark Horse Comics]]. He did the lettering for most ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] published from [[2007]] onwards. Among his works are ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' comics "[[Marooned]]," "[[Marked]]," "[[Shadows and Light]]" and "[[Unseen, Unheard]]," the last four volumes of [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']], most issues of ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'', and the entire [[Star Wars: Rebellion (comic series)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']], [[Star Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars Adventures'']], ''[[Star Wars: Invasion]]'', [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'']], ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic, Threat of Peace]]'', [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (comic series)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']], [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (graphic novellas)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' graphic novellas]], ''[[Star Wars: Lost Tribe of the Sith — Spiral]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Blood Ties]]'' series.

Heisler graduated from [[Wikipedia:Carnegie Mellon University|Carnegie Mellon University]] in [[Wikipedia:Pittsburgh|Pittsburgh]], [[Wikipedia:Pennsylvania|Pennsylvania]] with a double major in drawing and painting in [[1985]], before becoming a comic book letterer for [[Marvel Comics]] in [[1987]].<ref name="Todd's Blog" />
